phrases.intent_en: Ask where the customer service desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de atención al cliente?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh ah-ten-see-OHN al klee-EN-teh

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the right of the hallway.

responses.english: At the back, on the right of the hallway.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get a complaint form
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo conseguir una hoja de reclamaciones?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh kohn-seh-HEER oo-nah OH-hah deh reh-klah-mah-SYOH-nehs?

likely_response.local: En la recepción, junto al ordenador.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN HOON-toh AHL ohr-deh-nah-DOHR
likely_response.translation_en: At reception, next to the computer.

responses.english: At reception, next to the computer.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN HOON-toh AHL ohr-deh-nah-DOHR
responses.local: En la recepción, junto al ordenador.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a hotel pickup
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reservo la recogida en mi hotel?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿KOH-moh rreh-SER-voh lah rreh-koh-HEE-dah en mee oh-TEL?

likely_response.local: Rellene este formulario con sus datos de alojamiento.
likely_response.pronunciation: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh KOHN SOOS DAH-tohs DEH ah-loh-hah-mee-EHN-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Fill out this form with your accommodation details.

responses.english: Fill out this form with your accommodation details.
responses.phonetic: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh KOHN SOOS DAH-tohs DEH ah-loh-hah-mee-EHN-toh
responses.local: Rellene este formulario con sus datos de alojamiento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if cable car packages are available today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay paquetes del teleférico disponibles hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, eye pah-KEH-tehs del teh-leh-FEH-ree-koh dee-poh-NEE-blehs oy?

likely_response.translation_en: Check availability on the indicated panel.

responses.english: Check availability on the indicated panel.
